all.en: Brightline Appliances is voluntarily recalling certain models of its electric kettles.
all.zh: Brightline 家電自主召回特定型號的電熱水壺。

all.en: The recall affects units sold between January and August of last year.
all.zh: 本次召回影響去年一月至八月間售出的產品。

all.en: Approximately 78,000 units distributed across North America are involved.
all.zh: 約有七萬八千台分布於北美各地的產品涉及在內。

all.en: The affected models are EK210, EK215, and EK220 series kettles.
all.zh: 受影響的型號為 EK210、EK215 及 EK220 系列電熱水壺。

all.en: Model and serial numbers can be found on the base of each unit.
all.zh: 型號與序號可於每台機器的底部找到。

all.en: An internal investigation identified a potential defect in the heating element seal.
all.zh: 內部調查發現加熱元件密封處可能存在缺陷。

all.en: Under certain conditions, the seal may fail and allow water to contact wiring.
all.zh: 在特定情況下，密封可能失效，使水與電線接觸。

all.en: This poses a risk of electric shock or fire hazard to consumers.
all.zh: 此可能對消費者造成觸電或火災的風險。

all.en: The company has received nine reports of overheating and one minor injury.
all.zh: 公司已接獲九件過熱通報及一件輕微傷害案例。

all.en: Out of caution, all customers are urged to stop using the products immediately.
all.zh: 出於審慎考量，敦請所有顧客立即停止使用此產品。

all.en: Please unplug the kettle and place it in a safe, dry location.
all.zh: 請拔除電熱水壺電源並放置於安全、乾燥處。

all.en: Brightline will provide a full refund or a free replacement of a newer model.
all.zh: Brightline 將提供全額退款或免費更換為較新型號。

all.en: Customers may register their claim through the official recall website.
all.zh: 顧客可透過官方召回網站登記申請。

all.en: The website address is www.brightline-recall.com and is available 24 hours daily.
all.zh: 網址為 www.brightline-recall.com，全天二十四小時開放。

all.en: A toll-free hotline is also available at 1-800-555-0322 during business hours.
all.zh: 亦提供免付費專線 1-800-555-0322，於營業時間內服務。

all.en: Customers will receive prepaid return labels within five business days of registration.
all.zh: 顧客將於登記後五個工作日內收到預付運費的回收標籤。

all.en: No charge will be applied for shipping, processing, or refund issuance.
all.zh: 運費、處理及退款發放均不另收取任何費用。

all.en: Refunds are typically credited within 14 business days of product receipt.
all.zh: 退款通常於收到產品後十四個工作天內入帳。

all.en: Retailers have been instructed to remove affected units from store shelves.
all.zh: 已通知零售商將受影響商品自貨架上撤下。

all.en: All in-transit shipments have been intercepted and rerouted for inspection.
all.zh: 所有運送中的貨物已被攔截並改道送檢。

all.en: Brightline is working with safety regulators to ensure full transparency.
all.zh: Brightline 正與安全主管機關合作以確保完全透明。

all.en: We deeply regret the inconvenience this recall may cause our valued customers.
all.zh: 我們對此次召回造成尊貴顧客的不便深感抱歉。

all.en: Consumer safety remains our highest priority in everything we manufacture.
all.zh: 消費者安全始終是我們在所有製造活動中的最高優先。

all.en: Updates on the recall will be posted regularly on our official channels.
all.zh: 本次召回的最新進度將定期於官方管道更新發布。
